title: orium lanuginosum
intro: Orium lanuginosum, also known as Bearberry or Uva-ursi, is a low-growing, deciduous shrub native to Europe and North America, characterized by its white or pink flowers and small, red or yellow berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to have antibacterial and antifungal effects, making it effective in treating urinary tract infections and other infections. The health benefits of Orium lanuginosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support immune function. Orium lanuginosum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
